creator: B.Candler@pobox.com
text:
At http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO_8859-1/books/handbook/current-stable.html

It says "Use cvsup with _this supfile_" which is a link to
ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/FreeBSD-current/src/share/examples/cvsup/standard-supfile
This does not exist.

In fact there are other breakages. e.g. it says
"The source tree for FreeBSD-CURRENT is always ``exported'' on: ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/FreeBSD-current/"
and this is not the case.
